mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, triggering risk-off flows that produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60d returns with statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, which translates into positive short-term S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 5d returns during early-cycle phases, with mean forward returns statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 220 indicate entrenched inflationary pressures that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL readings above 220 consistently coincide with positive 20d SPX returns, or the signal loses predictive power during high-inflation regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market absorption, supporting consumer spending and corporate earnings, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields negative or zero 20d forward returns in > 55% of observations over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth reflects underlying economic expansion that supports aggregate corporate profit growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show no statistically significant correlation with 60d forward returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained contraction in industrial production below 108 signals severe supply-side weakness and manufacturing recession, triggering equity deleveraging and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO readings below 108 fail to predict negative 20d returns, with positive returns occurring in > 65% of triggered instances.
